name: Easy One-Dish Ham Bake
recipeIngredient: 1 package Frozen broccoli cuts, 16oz., Rinsed and drained
3 cups Cut-up ham, chicken, turkey or beef
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 450°F.
2. Mix broccoli, soups, 1 cup milk, the ham, and onion powder in an ungreased rectangular baking dish (13x9x2 inches).
3. In a separate bowl, combine Bisquick baking mix and 1 1/2 cups milk.
4. Pour the mixture evenly over the soup mixture.
5. Sprinkle with parsley if desired.
6. Bake for 27 to 30 minutes or until light golden brown. Allow to stand at least 5 minutes before serving.
